tasks.label: Symfony: Cache leeren
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T api php bin/console cache:clear

tasks.label: Symfony: Migrations ausführen
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T api php bin/console doctrine:migrations:migrate --no-interaction

tasks.label: Symfony: Migrations-Status
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T api php bin/console doctrine:migrations:status

tasks.label: Symfony: Routes anzeigen
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T api php bin/console debug:router

tasks.label: PHPUnit: Alle Tests
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T api php vendor/bin/phpunit

tasks.label: PHPUnit: Aktuelle Datei
tasks.command: RELPATH=$(realpath --relative-to='${workspaceFolder}/api' '${file}') && docker compose exec -T -w /var/www/symfony api php vendor/bin/phpunit "$RELPATH"

tasks.label: PHPStan: Analyse src/
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T api php vendor/bin/phpstan analyse src --no-progress

tasks.label: PHPStan: Aktuelle Datei
tasks.command: RELPATH=$(realpath --relative-to='${workspaceFolder}/api' '${file}') && docker compose exec -T -w /var/www/symfony api php vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --no-progress "$RELPATH"

tasks.label: Composer: Install
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T api composer install
